caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark jacket, sits inside a car and speaks into a cluster of microphones from various news agencies, including "ANI" and "NATION." The scene is captured from a news broadcast, featuring a red and yellow "BREAKING" banner across the bottom and a "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo in the top right. Hindi text across the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". On the left and right sides of the screen, smaller inset images of other men appear with captions; the man on the left is identified as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and the man on the right as "विजेंद्र यादव," with "श्रवण कुमार" listed below him. As the sequence progresses, the inset image on the left is partially obscured, and a new inset image featuring a different man appears in the center-left area, captioned "ट चौधरी" and "जय लिंडा." The man in the car remains the central focus, speaking continuously throughout the clip.
